user_query: I'm organizing a company event and I want to include interesting facts about numbers to engage the attendees. Fetch a trivia fact using the Numbers API and provide a random Chuck Norris joke to entertain the audience. Additionally, calculate the love percentage between two random participants to spread some love.

TaskList.description: Fetch a trivia fact about numbers using the Numbers API.
Fetch a random Chuck Norris joke to entertain the audience.
Calculate the love percentage between two random participants.
